conservative.name: Final Caress
conservative.requirements: You must be engaged with your target

success.description: Your touch causes the target to reel in excruciating pain. You deal normal damage plus damage equal to the number of fatigue the target suffers from
As above, and your touch invades the target's mind as well, inflicting additional damage equal to the number of stress the target suffers from

chaosStar.description: You share in the delicate pleasure of the pain you cause. Suffer damage equal to the number of insanities your target suffers from

sigmarsComet.description: The target suffers from 1 fatigue, 1 stress, and +2 damage

reckless.name: Final Caress
reckless.requirements: You must be engaged with your target

success.description: Your touch causes the target to reel in excruciating pain. You deal normal damage plus damage equal to the number of fatigue and stress the target suffers from
As above, and the attack inflicts critical damage if any of the target's mental characteristics are distressed or physical characteristics are fatigued

chaosStar.description: You share in the delicate pleasure of the pain you cause. Suffer damage equal to the number of insanities your target suffers from
